elements.original_description: A small human figure sits alone on a plain white floor, shoulders slumped, with a sad expression. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a small human figure sitting alone on a vast, plain white floor, shoulders slumped in dejection, with a sad, forlorn expression on their face. Cinematic lighting with soft, cool tones to evoke a feeling of loneliness and isolation. The background is a pure, seamless white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A cheerful gift box with a bright red bow appears on a white background, radiating happiness and warmth. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a cheerful, beautifully wrapped gift box with a large, bright red satin bow on top, radiating happiness and warmth. Soft, warm, inviting cinematic lighting with subtle lens flare. The box sits on a pure white, clean background. Sharp focus on the gift box. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
